calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar sent forthwith from Department 206 for a Short Cause Trial against Defendant Sergey Melnikov.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Pliego; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18:12 a.m. and concluding at 10:28:33 a.m.(D505)

Douglas Stuart Wallace, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff American Express National Bank.
Defendant Sergey Melnikov not appearing.
Gabriel Montano sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff American Express National Bank.

Notice of time and place of trial and trial Order filed and served on Aug-23-2023.

Counsel to summarize the facts of the case and the causes of action.
Court examines witness as custodian of records for plaintiff.
Witness confirms that all documents are true and correct.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court to review:
Exhibit A: Account record
Exhibit B: Account record from 2021 to 2023.

Based on the testimony and exhibits submitted, the Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff. Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:

Damages $57,509.49
Attorney's Fees $0
Interest $0
Costs $503.50

Total Judgment $58,012.99

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

Parties stipulate to the return of the exhibits.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Set For Trial On Feb-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
